title: Maximum recorded lifespan by animal (years)

source.name: AnAge Database of Animal Ageing and Longevity / peer-reviewed studies
source.publisher: Human Ageing Genomic Resources / Longevity Science

notes: Illustrative; figures represent maximum recorded or estimated lifespans from peer-reviewed sources including Nielsen et al. 2016 (Greenland shark) and Wanamaker et al. 2008 (ocean quahog).
